summary: PR 2386 matched and linked the game-mode gmregcommon object by moving gmregcommon.c from NonMatching to Matching, adding the lbl_803D79F0 byte data definition and header extern, and changing several symbols.txt data labels to local @ labels. The bot report recorded one new data match for main/melee/gm/gmregcommon .data, going from 85.37% to 100.00%.

key_files.role: Updated symbol metadata for gmregcommon-related data, changing lbl_803D7A08, lbl_803D7A40, and lbl_804D4050 to local @ labels.
Changed melee/gm/gmregcommon.c from Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk around MatchingFor object list

key_files.role: Added the lbl_803D79F0 u8 data array with 24 byte values.
Declared extern u8 lbl_803D79F0[] for the newly source-owned data array.

what_changed.text: gmregcommon.c was linked as a Matching object in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py NonMatching to Matching for melee/gm/gmregcommon.c

what_changed.text: The byte array lbl_803D79F0 was added to src/melee/gm/gmregcommon.c with values 0 through 17, then 20, 21, 22, 24, 25, and 33.
gmregcommon.h gained an extern declaration for lbl_803D79F0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmregcommon.h added extern u8 lbl_803D79F0[]

what_changed.text: symbols.txt changed three data string labels from global lbl_* names to local @75, @76, and @77 labels with scope:local.
The bot report recorded linked code +580 bytes, matched data +96 bytes, linked data +104 bytes, and one new match for main/melee/gm/gmregcommon .data from 85.37% to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired the configure.py Matching status change with the concrete source/header and symbols.txt changes needed for gmregcommon rather than only flipping the object state.
The source-owned data array was declared in the header, keeping external references consistent with the recovered data definition.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmregcommon.h added extern u8 lbl_803D79F0[]

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a focused object-linking PR, source data definitions, header declarations, symbol metadata, and configure.py Matching status may all need to move together to make the object link cleanly.

When symbol metadata shows nearby string/data labels are local to a translation unit, using local @ labels in symbols.txt can accompany a data match instead of leaving address-style global lbl_* names.

naming_conventions.text: Address-style lbl_803D79F0 was retained for the recovered u8 array; the PR evidence does not provide a semantic name for this data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmregcommon.h added extern u8 lbl_803D79F0[]

naming_conventions.text: Local unnamed data labels in symbols.txt used @NN form with scope:local, as shown by @75, @76, and @77.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Recovered a byte table in C as a u8 array with exact literal values, apparently supporting the gmregcommon data match reported by the bot.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report one new match for main/melee/gm/gmregcommon .data

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Adjusted symbol metadata from global lbl_* names to scope:local @ labels for strings around gmregcommon data.
Promoted the object to Matching only after the source, header, and symbol metadata changes were included in the same PR.

review_feedback.text: No inline review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.
A review by jurrejelle approved the PR without a body in the loaded text corpus.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: review author jurrejelle state APPROVED

review_feedback.text: The decomp-dev bot reported one new match for main/melee/gm/gmregcommon .data, 85.37% before and 100.00% after.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Object linking may require synchronized source, header, symbol metadata, and configure changes
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2386 linked gmregcommon by changing configure.py to Object(Matching), adding a C definition for lbl_803D79F0, declaring it in gmregcommon.h, and changing related symbols.txt entries to local @ labels.
